scenario.name: Check wallet balance
scenario.intent: show my wallet balance

assistantMessages:
I'll retrieve your margin account details to show your wallet balance. Let me first check for your API credentials.

```bash
# Check for credentials in environment variables and secrets files
API_KEY=$(printenv BINANCE_API_KEY 2>/dev/null)
SECRET_KEY=$(printenv BINANCE_SECRET_KEY 2>/dev/null)

# Fallback: search .env in known directories
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ] || [ -z "$SECRET_KEY" ]; then
  for dir in ~/.openclaw ~; do
    [ -n "$API_KEY" ] && break
    env_file="$dir/.env"
    [ -f "$env_file" ] || continue

    line1=$(sed -n '1p' "$env_file")
    line2=$(sed -n '2p' "$env_file")

    if [[ "$line1" == *=* && "$line2" == *=* ]]; then
      API_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_API_KEY=' "$env_file" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
      SECRET_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_SECRET_KEY=' "$env_file" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
    else
      API_KEY="$line1"
      SECRET_KEY="$line2"
    fi
  done
fi

if [ -z "$API_KEY" ] || [ -z "$SECRET_KEY" ]; then
  echo "CREDENTIALS_NOT_FOUND"
else
  echo "CREDENTIALS_FOUND"
fi
```

```bash
# Fetch Cross Margin Account Details
API_KEY="$BINANCE_API_KEY"
SECRET_KEY="$BINANCE_SECRET_KEY"

# Try secrets file if env vars not set
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  API_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_API_KEY=' ~/.openclaw/secrets.env 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
  SECRET_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_SECRET_KEY=' ~/.openclaw/secrets.env 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
fi
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  for dir in ~/.openclaw ~; do
    env_file="$dir/.env"
    [ -f "$env_file" ] || continue
    line1=$(sed -n '1p' "$env_file")
    line2=$(sed -n '2p' "$env_file")
    if [[ "$line1" == *=* && "$line2" == *=* ]]; then
      API_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_API_KEY=' "$env_file" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
      SECRET_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_SECRET_KEY=' "$env_file" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
    else
      API_KEY="$line1"
      SECRET_KEY="$line2"
    fi
    [ -n "$API_KEY" ] && break
  done
fi

BASE_URL="https://api.binance.com"
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%s000)
QUERY="timestamp=${TIMESTAMP}"
SIGNATURE=$(echo -n "$QUERY" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "$SECRET_KEY" | cut -d' ' -f2)

curl -s -X GET "${BASE_URL}/sapi/v1/margin/account?${QUERY}&signature=${SIGNATURE}" \
  -H "X-MBX-APIKEY: ${API_KEY}" \
  -H "User-Agent: binance-margin-trading/1.1.0 (Skill)"
```

| Metric | Source |

assistantMessages:
I can help you check your margin account portfolio. Let me retrieve your credentials and query the relevant margin account endpoints.

First, let me look for your API credentials.

```bash
# Try to retrieve credentials from environment variables and secrets files
API_KEY=$(printenv BINANCE_API_KEY 2>/dev/null)
SECRET_KEY=$(printenv BINANCE_SECRET_KEY 2>/dev/null)

# Fallback: search .env in known directories
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  for dir in ~/.openclaw ~; do
    env_file="$dir/.env"
    [ -f "$env_file" ] || continue

    line1=$(sed -n '1p' "$env_file")

    if [[ "$line1" == *=* && "$line2" == *=* ]]; then
      API_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_API_KEY=' "$env_file" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
      SECRET_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_SECRET_KEY=' "$env_file" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
    else
      API_KEY="$line1"
      SECRET_KEY="$line2"
    fi
    [ -n "$API_KEY" ] && break
  done
fi

if [ -z "$API_KEY" ] || [ -z "$SECRET_KEY" ]; then
  echo "CREDENTIALS_NOT_FOUND"
else
  echo "CREDENTIALS_FOUND"
fi
```

```bash
# Read credentials securely and query Cross Margin + Isolated Margin accounts
API_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_API_KEY=' ~/.openclaw/secrets.env 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)
SECRET_KEY=$(grep '^BINANCE_SECRET_KEY=' ~/.openclaw/secrets.env 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)

# Fallback to env vars
[ -z "$API_KEY" ] && API_KEY="$BINANCE_API_KEY"
[ -z "$SECRET_KEY" ] && SECRET_KEY="$BINANCE_SECRET_KEY"

BASE_URL="https://api.binance.com"
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%s000)

sign() {
  local query="$1"
  echo -n "$query" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "$SECRET_KEY" | cut -d' ' -f2
}

# ── 1. Cross Margin Account ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
QUERY_CROSS="timestamp=${TIMESTAMP}"
SIG_CROSS=$(sign "$QUERY_CROSS")

echo "=== CROSS MARGIN ACCOUNT ==="
curl -s -X GET "${BASE_URL}/sapi/v1/margin/account?${QUERY_CROSS}&signature=${SIG_CROSS}" \
  -H "X-MBX-APIKEY: ${API_KEY}" \
  -H "User-Agent: binance-margin-trading/1.1.0 (Skill)"

echo ""

# ── 2. Isolated Margin Account ───────────────────────────────────────────────
TIMESTAMP2=$(date +%s000)
QUERY_ISO="timestamp=${TIMESTAMP2}"
SIG_ISO=$(sign "$QUERY_ISO")

echo "=== ISOLATED MARGIN ACCOUNT ==="
curl -s -X GET "${BASE_URL}/sapi/v1/margin/isolated/account?${QUERY_ISO}&signature=${SIG_ISO}" \
  -H "X-MBX-APIKEY: ${API_KEY}" \
  -H "User-Agent: binance-margin-trading/1.1.0 (Skill)"

echo ""

# ── 3. Margin Summary (tradeCoeff) ───────────────────────────────────────────
TIMESTAMP3=$(date +%s000)
QUERY_SUMMARY="timestamp=${TIMESTAMP3}"
SIG_SUMMARY=$(sign "$QUERY_SUMMARY")

echo "=== MARGIN SUMMARY ==="
curl -s -X GET "${BASE_URL}/sapi/v1/margin/tradeCoeff?${QUERY_SUMMARY}&signature=${SIG_SUMMARY}" \
  -H "X-MBX-APIKEY: ${API_KEY}" \
  -H "User-Agent: binance-margin-trading/1.1.0 (Skill)"
```
